title: Giveaway
description: A single live giveaway record (free game, beta key, DLC, or loot offer).

worth.description: USD worth as a formatted string (e.g. "$9.99"). May be "N/A" when no retail value applies.

thumbnail.description: URL of the small thumbnail image.

image.description: URL of the large promotional image.

description.example: Download Moonrise Fall for free on Steam until June 2!

instructions.description: Step-by-step instructions for claiming the giveaway. Newline-separated steps.
instructions.example:
1. Click the button to visit the giveaway page.
2. Download via Steam.

open_giveaway_url.description: Tracked redirect URL that opens the upstream provider page for claiming.

published_date.description: Date and time the giveaway was published on GamerPower (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS UTC).

type.description: Category of the offer (Game, DLC, Loot, Early Access, etc.).

platforms.description: Comma-separated list of human-readable platform names the offer applies to.

end_date.description: Date and time the giveaway expires (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS UTC) or "N/A".

users.description: Count of GamerPower users who have viewed or claimed the giveaway.

gamerpower_url.description: Canonical GamerPower page URL for the giveaway.

open_giveaway.description: Alias of open_giveaway_url. Present on list responses; omitted on single-giveaway lookups.
